Tier 2 — Strategic Analysis
Critical Path Suppliers
2 Critical
GE Vernova — Generator + Switchgear ($2.09M)
True critical path. 40–56 week lead time. Must award by August 15 for Q2 2027 first power. Competitive bid with Siemens Energy required.
→ rfq_generator_ge_vernova.txt ready for May 25
ABB Power Grids — Step-up Transformer ($760K)
52–70 week lead. Blocked on EthosEnergy ICD for voltage/MVA specification. Competitive bid with Siemens Energy. Expedite premium ~15% available.
→ Blocked · rfq_transformer_abb.txt ready when ICD received
Emerson — Fuel Gas System ($700K)
Fisher regulators + Daniel flow meters — W251B8 standard. Bob Yeager (President) primary contact. 16–24 week lead. Expected at estimate.
→ rfq_bob_yeager_emerson.txt ready
CECO Environmental — SCR / Emissions ($892K)
SCR + CO catalyst combined package. 24–36 week lead. Pending NM environmental permit scope confirmation.
→ Confirm NM permit limits · rfq_ceco_emissions.txt drafted
